hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'frontend/src/.*\.(jsx|js)$' && cd /Users/yangjongtae/workspace/happiness-app/frontend && PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v17.4.0/bin:$PATH" npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; } 2>/dev/null || true
